name: XMM-Newton
description: ESA's X-ray multi-mirror mission. 3 telescopes in one spacecraft. Like Chandra, uses a highly elliptical orbit to escape Earth's radiation. Over 1,000 peer-reviewed papers published from its data. Launched the same year as Chandra — two observatories, two continents, the same invisible sky.
scale_fact: XMM-Newton and Chandra are diplomatic parallels — NASA and ESA each built their own X-ray observatory rather than collaborating on one. Science got two telescopes.
